headline: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

site_brief.audience: buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents
site_brief.goal: Create a frequently refreshed editorial blog homepage with a lead analysis, short posts, source cards, and a clear Super perspective on why computer-use caching makes repeated agent work cheaper and better.
site_brief.title: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

summary: A continuously refreshed editorial brief for buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents. This edition synthesizes today’s news on Gemini’s computer‑use push, Grok’s rapid model cadence, Siri’s next‑gen rollout, and the growing demand for personal agents — with a clear Super perspective on why durable computer‑use workflows and a reusable computer-use cache matter.
